name: the documentation rules are registered in the standards catalog and cite a source
command: grep -q 'id: g-doc-001' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/documentation/doc-enforcement.yaml" && grep -q 'source: madr' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/documentation/doc-enforcement.yaml" && echo doc-rules-grounded 1>&2
